message:
fix: ShouldExportJSONL/ShouldImportJSONL now check config.yaml via GetSyncMode (bd-6fiwk)

These functions previously read sync.mode only from the database, ignoring
config.yaml. When sync.mode was set in config.yaml (e.g. dolt-native during
migration) but not propagated to the DB, JSONL export/import still ran,
causing 10-25s delays per bd write operation.

Now both functions use GetSyncMode which checks config.yaml first, then
falls back to the database — matching the behavior of ShouldUseDoltRemote.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
